# ⚠️ Code Folders — Do Not Edit Manually

The following folders contain the code that runs the website. **Do not manually edit files in these folders** unless you are using Claude Code to assist you.

```
app/
styles/
public/
tailwind.config.ts
next.config.mjs
package.json
```

Editing these files incorrectly can break the website.

---

## ✅ Safe Zone — OK to Edit

The only folder you should directly add files to is:

```
content/
content/photos/       ← drop gallery photos here
content/leadership/   ← drop leadership headshots here
```

---

## Making Code Changes Safely

If you need to update text, sermon links, staff names, or any other content on the site:

1. Open Claude Code
2. Describe what you want to change in plain English
3. Claude will make the edit and explain what was changed

This protects the website from accidental breakage and keeps the codebase clean.
